implementation_owners: 18-case execution agents and sealed v21 runtime scripts

evidence: All 144 files listed by the 18 result seals match their SHA-256 values, and every hashes.json map exactly matches its result seal.
All 18 statuses record state=complete, attempt_number=1, no_retry_performed=true, and gate_pass=true; no exception.json exists.
Independent trace audit counts 108000 sequential 0.1 s accepted steps, all 108000 with main_corrector_converged, with zero rescue, continuation attempt/trigger, rejection, or nonconvergence.

Independent scalar audit counts 108018 finite frames. Every frame is source_only, all required model/source validity fields are true, all invalidity/slack/end-stop/design-exceedance fields are false, and all 18 time axes are identical from 0 to 600 s.
Independent row-wise reconstruction gives zero soil-X alias residual and zero translation-plus-rotation decomposition residual in every case.
Every frame remains below the case relief pressure and has positive accumulator volume; all module-origin audits resolve to the authoritative app directory.
The sealed analyze_matrix.py parses successfully and its read-only verify_case gate accepts all 18 current result seals without invoking analysis main.
process_correctness.finding: All 18 result packages were independently rehashed and recomputed from their accepted-corrector traces and full-resolution scalar tables. Every case satisfies the current lineage, single-attempt, completion, convergence, source-domain, repaired soil-X, buffer, pressure, accumulator-volume, and model-validity contracts.

evidence: The largest accepted-step residual across all runs is 9.999738188257168e-7 with at most 5 iterations, while every case passes its predefined convergence gate.
The minimum centered half-stroke margin across all runs is positive at 0.13466296235796182 m, with zero end-stop frames.
The minimum accumulator volume is positive at 0.04390191892645257 m^3; the maximum branch pressure is 22.223830920127697 MPa against a 31.5 MPa relief boundary.
The analyzer SHA-256 e8379de5754cd3e4f933555055d17a405ae4912b934a579ee80032b1d543a98f is bound by the ready candidate, and matrix_analysis did not exist during this review.

Soil displacement and force engineering applicability remain not evaluated because authoritative project limits are absent. No safety, design-optimum, linearity, interaction, curvature, or paper-level conclusion is made here.
result_reasonableness.finding: GO to execute the sealed analyze_matrix.py once. Aggregate numerical and operating-boundary checks are coherent across the complete case set, with no failed or exceptional run. This approval concerns analyzer execution only; the derived matrix result still requires its own seal and independent evidence review before any trend or paper claim.

evidence: The formal order contains exactly 18 unique cases and the results directory set matches it exactly.
All results bind ready candidate ff0aea354090e2b14191beb4dec291ed5bdf0414ec2e7e33443aae4a1068482c and stage review seal c7070b596090d12b2423345221c27280f4774b1ab3dedf141285d9ba7b799203.

starting_premise.finding: The stage asks the correct bounded question: whether all 18 same-generation v21 runs have complete, current, numerically valid evidence sufficient to execute the already sealed descriptive matrix analyzer. It does not ask for or authorize trend interpretation, engineering-limit conclusions, or paper promotion.
